name: Key Value
goal: Render a definition list or ce-kv rows as an aligned grid with optional multi-column packing and tight typography.
description: Two authoring modes. Mode A (dt/dd): wraps slotted `<dt>/<dd>` pairs in a CSS-grid `<dl>` so keys align in a column — supports 1-3 column-pairs side-by-side. Mode B (ce-kv): when direct children include `<ce-kv>` elements, stacks them in a flex column — values in each row accept any HTML content per CDR-002. If any `<ce-kv>` children are present Mode B is used; otherwise Mode A.

props.name: wrap
props.description: Allow value text to wrap; set to "false" for ellipsised single-line values.

slots.description: Mode A: alternating `<dt>`/`<dd>` pairs. Mode B: `<ce-kv>` children — detected automatically; values in each `<ce-kv>` accept any HTML content including `<a>`, `<time>`, `<ce-chip>`, or typed renderers (CDR-002).
